component.name: CanMV IDE
component.summary: IDE for Kendryte CanMV embedded AI devices

description.p: CanMV IDE is an integrated development environment based on OpenMV IDE (Qt Creator) for developing MicroPython applications on Kendryte CanMV series embedded AI devices, including K210 and K230 RISC-V AIoT chips.

ul.li: MicroPython development, debugging, and real-time code execution on CanMV devices
Computer vision and machine vision application development with built-in algorithm libraries
Real-time serial terminal and device communication via USB
Built-in code editor with syntax highlighting and auto-completion
Device file system browser for managing on-device storage
Firmware flashing and device configuration tools
Frame buffer viewer for real-time camera image preview
Built on the Qt Creator framework with full IDE tooling

screenshot.caption: CanMV IDE main window with code editor and frame buffer
